# `/kill` Command
Kills entities (players, mobs, etc.).

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/kill [target: target]`

## Arguments
- `target`: target
